description: Endless canopy and tangled roots where sunlight filters in broken shafts and every shadow could be watching.
biomes: Bamboo
Tall green stalks packed so tight the light barely reaches the floor. Everything creaks and sways, and the shadows move between the stems.
Enchanted
The trees hum with old magic. Paths shift when you are not looking, and the forest itself seems to breathe.
Mushroom
Towering caps of red and violet rise above the undergrowth. The air is thick with spores, and the ground feels spongy and alive.
Pine
Dark evergreen columns standing in silent rows. The floor is a carpet of needles, and the air smells sharp and cold.
Tropical
Thick heat, bright plumage, and the constant drone of insects. Vines hang from every branch and the canopy blocks the sky.
Woodland
Dappled sunlight on mossy stones and birdsong from every direction. A gentle place, though old things still sleep beneath the roots.
Jungle
Dense, sweltering green pressing in from all sides. The air is wet enough to drink, and something always moves just out of sight.
Rainforest
Layers of life stacked from floor to canopy, dripping with moisture. The chorus of creatures never stops, day or night.
Petrified
Stone trees stand like monuments to a forest that died long ago. The silence here is absolute and unsettling.
Crystal Grove
Trees of translucent stone catch the light and scatter rainbows across the forest floor. The air rings faintly, like distant bells.
Dead Woods
Bare branches claw at a grey sky. The bark is black, the ground is ash, and nothing here has been alive for a long time.
Autumn Eternal
Gold and crimson leaves drift endlessly but the branches never go bare. The air smells of woodsmoke and wet earth.
